field.label: Enable
field.help: Enable the DS-Lite / Fixed IP IPv4-in-IPv6 tunnel.

field.label: Mode
field.help: DS-Lite uses shared IPv4 via CG-NAT. Fixed IP uses a dedicated public IPv4 address (requires ISP subscription).

field.label: ISP Profile
field.help: Select your ISP service. This sets the correct AFTR address automatically. Only used in DS-Lite mode.

field.label: WAN Interface
field.help: Select the WAN interface with IPv6 connectivity (DHCPv6).

field.label: AFTR Hostname
field.help: AFTR hostname for DNS resolution. Used when ISP profile is "Custom".

field.label: AFTR IPv6 Address
field.help: Static AFTR IPv6 address. Leave empty to resolve from hostname or use ISP profile default.

field.label: MTU
field.help: Tunnel interface MTU. Default 1460 (1500 - 40 byte IPv6 header).

field.label: TCP MSS Clamp
field.help: TCP Maximum Segment Size clamping value. Default 1420.

field.label: Enable NAT
field.help: Enable IPv4 NAT (masquerade) on the tunnel interface. Required for DS-Lite, optional for Fixed IP.

field.label: Interface ID (IPv6)
field.help: Your assigned Interface ID in full IPv6 format. Used as the tunnel source address. (Fixed IP mode only)

field.label: AFTR Endpoint (IPv6)
field.help: Your assigned AFTR endpoint IPv6 address. (Fixed IP mode only)

field.label: Fixed IPv4 Address
field.help: Your assigned fixed public IPv4 address. (Fixed IP mode only)

field.label: Prefix Update URL
field.help: URL for periodic prefix updates (e.g., https://v6update.asahi-net.or.jp/prefix). (Fixed IP mode only)

field.label: Auth User ID
field.help: Authentication user ID for prefix updates. (Fixed IP mode only)

field.label: Auth Password
field.help: Authentication password for prefix updates. (Fixed IP mode only)
